race.comment: ALOHA BLUE (9) stuck on well from the speed to miss out by 0.2L last time out over 1200m at Gawler. She was able to get across from out wide last start and Holder will look to do the same. She's a track and trip winner previously and can turn the tables. NOSTRYIA (1) is first-up here without a trial but he's spent much of his recent racing in stronger company than this. He's placed in all 3 attempts at this track and trip and jumped favourite here in July last year. Can't be left out. SIOUX WARRIOR (13) can't be discounted on his recent form. CASPER DE LUNE (3) resuming from a break. Ran fifth in latest jump-out at Morphettville. Opened last campaign with a fifth at Murray Bridge over 1000m. In the mix fresh.
